goals.title: Ponytail principles refactor for GT_PJT. Deliverable: install/enable...
goals.objective: Ponytail principles refactor for GT_PJT. Deliverable: install/enable Ponytail plugin if CLI supports it, then complete a first-wave low-risk behavior-preserving refactor in this repository. Constraints: preserve behavior; no new dependencies; do not revert user changes; avoid dirty files unless unavoidable; frontend/backend/llm_server should not be broadly rewritten at once; security/auth/data-loss/accessibility/test stability must not be weakened; use existing helpers and stdlib first. Success criteria: C1 install evidence: Ponytail marketplace/plugin setup command result is captured, or the exact blocker and next UI step is captured. C2 planning evidence: repo survey classifies refactor candidates by impact/risk and selects only low-risk first-wave scope. C3 behavior evidence: before/after characterization or existing tests prove behavior preserved for touched code. C4 verification evidence: targeted tests for touched area pass; available broader commands are attempted or blockers captured exactly. C5 final review evidence: diff is reviewed for Ponytail principles, no user changes reverted, cleanup receipts recorded.

successCriteria.scenario: CLI install/setup: run codex plugin marketplace add DietrichGebert/ponytail, codex plugin add ponytail@ponytail --json, and codex plugin list; PASS when list shows ponytail@ponytail installed/enabled or command output gives exact blocker.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/ponytail-refactor-20260624/evidence/C001-ponytail-install.txt | cleanup: no runtime process, tmux session, browser context, container, bound port, or temp dir created

successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Replace via revise_criterion with boundary or malformed-input proof for: Ponytail principles refactor for GT_PJT. Deliverable: install/enable Ponytail....
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/ponytail-refactor-20260624/evidence/C002-llm-main-pytest.txt | programming checker no violations; llm_server 29 passed, backend 84 passed, frontend 16 passed; cleanup complete

successCriteria.scenario: Regression/scope control: inspect git diff --name-only and git diff for changed files; PASS when only intended clean files changed, dirty user files remain unreverted, and Ponytail review finds no new dependency or behavior change.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: .omo/ulw-loop/ponytail-refactor-20260624/evidence/C003-diff-review.txt | programming checker no violations; current diff scoped to llm_server first-wave files; cleanup complete

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/ponytail-refactor-20260624/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/ponytail-refactor-20260624/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
